parserRegularExpression1.ts(1,27): error TS1516: A character class range must not be bounded by another character class.


==== parserRegularExpression1.ts (1 errors) ====
    /(#?-?\d*\.\d\w*%?)|(@?#?[\w-?]+%?)/g;
                              ~~
!!! error TS1516: A character class range must not be bounded by another character class.
